name: Gatnabour
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the rice.
2. Cook in one cup of boiling water until absorbed.
3. Add cooked rice (or bulghur) to the warm milk and cook on a low fire for 40 minutes, stirring frequently.
4. Add the salt and sugar and cook for an additional 15 minutes.
5. Continue stirring. Pour into individual dessert dishes and cool.
6. Sprinkle with cinnamon.
Serves
